title: Award (canonical entity file)
description: One file per earned award/recognition: data/awards/<slug>.json. Versioned entities (record-level SCD-2) so renames/retirements (e.g. NOVA discontinued 2025) are lifecycle events, not edits. Scope: awards members EARN or are RECOGNIZED with — religious emblems, training awards, and scouting honors / special recognitions — NOT plain uniform insignia. Only FACTS are stored (name, category, audience, square-knot + insignia item numbers, wear location) plus an optional ORIGINAL-prose summary; verbatim Guide to Awards & Insignia text is © Scouting America and is never reproduced here. Any actual earning requirements, when a source exists, live in requirement-set documents (subject: award:<slug>), same as ranks/badges.

name.description: Award name during this window, e.g. "Scouter's Key", "Honor Medal".

category.description: Open vocab; seeded set: religious_emblem | training_award | scouting_honor | special_recognition.

audience.description: Who earns/wears it: youth member, adult leader, or both.

programs.description: Programs it applies to (scouts_bsa | cub_scouts | venturing | sea_scouts | all); open vocab, may be empty when cross-program.

square_knot_no.description: Scouting America catalog number of the square-knot emblem worn for this award, when it has one (a fact, not copyrightable).

insignia_nos.description: Catalog numbers of the medal/device/emblem items associated with this award (facts).

wear.description: Short factual wear location, e.g. "above left pocket".

restricted.description: True if the item is restricted (controlled purchase); null if unknown.

summary.description: Optional ORIGINAL one-line description of what the award recognizes. Not verbatim Guide text; carries no third-party copyright.
